recommendations.title: Sex and Death 101
recommendations.overview: A guy's life is turned around by an email, which includes the names of everyone he's had sex with and ever will have sex with. His situation gets worse when he encounters a femme fatale who targets men guilty of sex crime.

recommendations.title: The Takeover
recommendations.overview: Self-proclaimed ethical hacker Mel Bandison's life is turned upside down when she stops a data breach on a high-tech self-driving bus that also happens to shut down an international criminal network. She then becomes a target and is framed with a dee

recommendations.title: Love and Pigeons
recommendations.overview: In a remote Siberian village, a work injury sends Vasily Kuziakin on a paid trip to a Black Sea resort as compensation. There, he meets femme fatale Raisa Zaharovna and decides to stay with her. Such is the beginning of a new life for him, exciting a

recommendations.title: The Shadow Effect
recommendations.overview: A young man's life is turned upside down when his violent dreams begin to blend with reality.

recommendations.title: The Dirties
recommendations.overview: The line between reality and fiction starts to blur when two best friends start making a movie about getting revenge on bullies.

recommendations.title: Waiting for Forever
recommendations.overview: A Hollywood-set romantic tale of a guy who is content to live his life without a job yet with the love of his life, a young actress.

recommendations.title: The Man with Two Brains
recommendations.overview: A brain surgeon marries a femme fatale, causing his life to turn upside down. Things go more awry when he falls in love with a talking brain.

recommendations.title: Original Sin
recommendations.overview: A young man is plunged into a life of subterfuge, deceit and mistaken identity in pursuit of a femme fatale whose heart is never quite within his grasp.

recommendations.title: Anomalisa
recommendations.overview: An inspirational speaker becomes reinvigorated after meeting a lively woman who shakes up his mundane existence.

recommendations.title: A Whisker Away
recommendations.overview: A peculiar girl transforms into a cat to catch her crush's attention. But before she realizes it, the line between human and animal starts to blur.
